privileged_info_summary: The task configures a video wall named 'Distribution Hub SOC' in a local Nx Witness VMS instance at https://localhost:7001/rest/v1/. It requires creating 4 layouts with the 'SOC - ' prefix: 'SOC - Parking View' (containing Parking Lot Camera), 'SOC - Entrance View' (containing Entrance Camera), 'SOC - Server Room View' (containing Server Room Camera), and 'SOC - Overview' (containing all 3 cameras). A 2x2 grid of video wall items must be created linking to these layouts, with each screen at 1920x1080 resolution, autorun enabled, and a summary report saved to /home/ga/video_wall_report.txt. All data is synthetic: cameras are virtual test streams created by testcamera during environment setup.
